title: abrus aureus subsp. aureus
intro: Abrus aureus subsp. aureus, also known as the golden chain tree, is a perennial climber belonging to the Fabaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant is said to provide various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating wounds, and supporting respiratory health. In herbal preparations, the seeds and leaves of Abrus aureus subsp. aureus can be used to make decoctions, infusions, and ointments, although its use requires careful handling due to its potential toxicity.
